case_title: MUNSON HOLDINGS, LLC VS. HERBERT K. GREEN JR ET AL

THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE; $7,249.49 RENT, $2,050.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $615.00 COSTS, $9,816.35 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,730.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
